title: Welcome to StoryWeaver Workspace
description: Introduction to the visual novel authoring platform, senior project structure, and pair programming workspace.

content.text: Welcome to the central documentation hub and local-first knowledge base for StoryWeaver - a computer science senior project dedicated to building a local-first, interactive game engine and authoring pipeline for branching visual novel narratives.

This workspace integrates academic theory, system architecture, and an AI-Human pairing audit trail for senior thesis evaluation. The entire implementation process is documented to prove software engineering rigor.

title: Quick Navigation Guide
description: Direct access points to the AI Collaboration Log, Wiki Content Index, and CS02D Project Proposal.

content.text: The primary audit trail tracking prompts, generated code blocks, and evaluations for every iteration of project development.
The central catalog for literature sources, technical concepts, and project entities involved in the system's creation.
The core project specification, architectural overview, and developmental milestones for evaluation.

title: Workspace Architecture
description: Detailed structural overview of the Theoretical Wiki and the AI Collaboration Logs.

content.text: Holds structured notes linking software implementation to academic foundations: sources (summaries of research papers), concepts (directed graph theory, finite state machine, interpreter pattern, StoryWeaver architecture), and entities.
Chronological audit logs tracking code generation sessions. Subfolders organize iterations into UI Scaffolding, Core Logic & Traversal, and Refactoring & Validation.

title: Tech Stack Rules
description: Architectural rules, languages, libraries, and storage constraints governing the codebase.

content.text: Strict type safety via TypeScript, React frontend library, Zustand for reactive global state management, and Zod for runtime data validation schemas.
Dexie.js-managed IndexedDB and Origin Private File System (OPFS) to bypass the 5MB browser localStorage limits and store heavy multimedia assets offline.

title: Logging Standards
description: Structure of documentation logs, frontmatter metadata properties, and prompt logs formats.

content.text: Every iteration is documented as a markdown file inside AI_Prompt_Logs with metadata properties, prompt history, generated code files, and human review placeholders.
